title: Peppery Flaky Spanish Chicken Paella
description: A hearty and flavorful Spanish dish made with brown rice, chicken, and a blend of spices, perfect for a sick day.

ingredients.name: White wine
ingredients.notes: Dry white wine for added flavor

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
Add the onion and red bell pepper to the pan and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the smoked paprika, chicken broth, and white wine to the pan and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the pan and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Add the brown rice to the pan and stir to combine with the chicken and broth.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Stir in the chopped parsley and serve hot.
